description: Plugin-distributed hooks for behavioral-mental-health-practice. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags behavioral-health anti-patterns (plaintext PHI/SSN, disclosure without Part 2 consent note, service without medical-necessity note, telehealth cross-state without licensure note). Set BH_PRACTICE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
